summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P2-3 Outgoing Webhooks feature. All backend API tests (20/20) and frontend UI tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: API Keys - List API keys (GET /api/api-keys)
API Keys - Create read-only API key (POST /api/api-keys with permissions=read)
API Keys - Create read-write API key (POST /api/api-keys with permissions=read_write)
API Keys - Delete API key (DELETE /api/api-keys/{id})
API Keys - Delete non-existent key returns 404
Webhooks - List webhooks (GET /api/webhooks)
Webhooks - Create outgoing webhook with events
Webhooks - Create incoming webhook
Webhooks - Update webhook toggle active status (PATCH /api/webhooks/{id})
Webhooks - Delete webhook (DELETE /api/webhooks/{id})
Webhooks - Delete non-existent webhook returns 404
Webhooks - Send test webhook to httpbin.org (success)
Webhooks - Send test webhook to invalid URL (graceful failure)
Webhooks - Test non-existent webhook returns 404
Webhook Logs - Get logs for specific webhook
Webhook Logs - List all webhook logs
Webhook Triggers - Webhook fires on order.created event when creating an order
Auth - List webhooks requires authentication
Auth - Create webhook requires authentication
Auth - List API keys requires authentication
UI - Integrations page loads correctly
UI - API Keys tab displays and Create Key button works
UI - Create API Key dialog with name and permissions
UI - Generated API key displayed with copy functionality
UI - Webhooks tab displays webhook list
UI - Create Webhook dialog with name, URL, direction, events
UI - Test webhook button sends test and shows success toast
UI - Toggle webhook active/inactive status
UI - Delete webhook with confirmation
seed_data_creation: Created test webhooks (TEST_*) and API keys (TEST_*) during testing - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2-3 Outgoing Webhooks feature is fully implemented and working. Webhooks are triggered as background tasks when orders are created (order.created event). The trigger_webhooks function in server.py (line ~3093) handles sending POST requests to configured webhook URLs. Webhook logs are stored in MongoDB webhook_logs collection. Test webhooks can be sent via POST /api/webhooks/{id}/test. The 'Order Notifications' webhook pointing to httpbin.org is pre-configured and working with 100% success rate.

mocked_apis.SMTP_email_notifications: MOCKED - Email notifications logged to console instead of sent via SMTP

webhook_crud.create_outgoing: WORKING - Creates webhook with name, URL, direction, events
webhook_crud.delete: WORKING - Deletes webhook and returns 404 for non-existent

webhook_test.send_test_success: WORKING - Sends test payload to httpbin.org, returns status 200
webhook_test.send_test_failure: WORKING - Gracefully handles invalid URLs, returns success=false with error

webhook_triggers.order_created: WORKING - Webhook fires when order is created via background task
webhook_triggers.logs_created: WORKING - Webhook delivery logs stored in webhook_logs collection

webhook_logs.get_by_webhook: WORKING - GET /api/webhooks/{id}/logs returns logs for specific webhook

api_keys_crud.create_read: WORKING - Creates key with rr_read_ prefix
api_keys_crud.create_read_write: WORKING - Creates key with rr_live_ prefix
api_keys_crud.list: WORKING - Returns all keys (without full key)
